specializations: Proprietary active ingredient development for beauty brands
product_highlights: Precision fermentation actives — entirely new bioactive molecules via synthetic biology
Synthetic biology-derived cosmetic ingredients with unprecedented performance
Custom proprietary active development for leading beauty brands
notes: Arcaea (formerly known as Bloomsbury Genetic Therapies' beauty division) is a pioneering synthetic biology company focused on creating next-generation beauty ingredients through precision fermentation and genetic engineering. Their technology platform enables the production of entirely new bioactive molecules with unprecedented performance characteristics. Arcaea represents the cutting edge of the biotech beauty ingredient revolution, working with leading beauty brands to develop proprietary actives that cannot be produced through conventional chemistry.
